channel.title: NAJ Mayol, C Artucio, I Batista, A Puentes, J Villegas, R Quizpe, V Rojas, J Mangione, J Belardi, NA | PlatCOVID
channel.description: NAJ Mayol, C Artucio, I Batista, A Puentes, J Villegas, R Quizpe, V Rojas, J Mangione, J Belardi, NA

image.title: NAJ Mayol, C Artucio, I Batista, A Puentes, J Villegas, R Quizpe, V Rojas, J Mangione, J Belardi, NA

item.title: An international survey in Latin America on the practice of interventional cardiology during the COVID-19 pandemic, with a particular focus on myocardial infarction.
